name: PointsCalculator

neutralConcepts: earnedPoints field NEVER in input shape — client-submitted points ignored
Output is pointBreakdown{} object — never a single total
All bonus thresholds from FREEDOM config — no hardcoded number literals
streakBonus NOT included — computed by StreakManager separately

ironRules.rule: earnedPoints field must NOT appear in T84 input shape. Client-submitted point values are untrusted and have no legitimate downstream use.
Output must be pointBreakdown{} object (base, correctAnswers, subtotal) — never a single numeric total. Audit requires breakdown.
All bonus thresholds (base points, per-correct points, time bonus) must come from FREEDOM config keys — no hardcoded number literals.
streakBonus is NOT computed by T84 — StreakManager (T96) handles streak. T84 output contains only answering points.

keywords: points calculator server side anti-farming trust boundary earned points forbidden field breakdown
